core_mechanism: representing structured objects as concrete sheaves on a concrete site, so that a category lacking closure gets embedded into a locally-cartesian-closed / topos-like completion possessing all limits, all colimits, exponential (function-space) objects, and a subobject classifier
brief_reason: The abstract recasts several formalisms as 'concrete sheaves on a concrete site' and derives from that single construction that their categories are locally cartesian closed with all limits, all colimits, and a weak subobject classifier — the transferable machinery is the sheaf-on-a-site closure of a non-closed category.
